channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Avid volunteer enjoys first Genesis Invitational
item.description: Jenny Liu has volunteered at Torrey Pines for 24 years. She’s seen a lot in her time, but this week it was her first experience with the Genesis Invitational.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Auburn, Alabama, Florida headline SEC's haul in the NCAA selection committee's early top-16 seeds
item.description: Auburn was the No. 1 overall seed while the Southeastern Conference tallied five of the top six seeds in the preliminary rankings unveiled Saturday by the committee that will select the 68-team field for the NCAA Tournament. The Tigers, ranked No.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NASCAR disqualifies Kligerman for too-low truck after flag-planting win at Daytona. He is appealing
item.description: Full-time television analyst and part-time NASCAR driver Parker Kligerman says he will appeal his disqualification that cost him the Truck Series win at Daytona.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Napheesa Collier takes home $200K and Unrivaled 1-on-1 crown, beating Aaliyah Edwards in final
item.description: MEDLEY, Fla. (AP) — Napheesa Collier of the WNBA's Minnesota Lynx took home $200,000 on Friday after she beat Washington Mystics forward Aaliyah Edwards in the final of Unrivaled's 1-on-1 tournament.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Left-hander Cole Ragans and Royals agree to $13.25 million, 3-year contract
item.description: SUPRISE, Ariz. (AP) — All-Star left-hander Cole Ragans and the Kansas City Royals agreed Friday to a $13.25 million, three-year contract. Ragans gets a $250,000 signing bonus and salaries of $1 million this year, $4.5 million in 2026 and $7.5 million in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shaprio mocked for Cowboys dig at Eagles' Super Bowl parade speech
item.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro was mocked by critics on social media after a questionable line during his speech at the Eagles' Super Bowl victory parade Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Title IX complaint filed against RIT for rostering trans athlete Sadie Schreiner
item.description: A women's rights group has filed a Title IX complaint with the U.S. Department of Education against the Rochester Institute of Technology over a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: DAYTONA, Fla. (WGHP) — The field of 41 racers has officially been set for Sunday's Daytona 500. This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway in Daytona Beach, Florida.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 1 UCLA ends its run as nation's lone unbeaten team with upset loss to crosstown rival USC
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The unbeaten streak is over for UCLA. The top-ranked Bruins lost 71-60 to sixth-ranked USC and JuJu Watkins on Thursday night, ending their school-record run of 23 consecutive victories to open the season. They were the nation’s last undefeated women’s team.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Strength in numbers: New Red Sox righty Walker Buehler sees club joining trend of Dodgers
item.description: FORT MYERS, Fla. (AP) — Walker Buehler won a World Series last year with the Los Angeles Dodgers, a team that’s stocked with starting pitching. He left as a free agent for a $21.05 million, one-year contract with the Boston Red Sox, a team also trying to loading up on starting arms.
item.dc:creator: BY KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bubba Wallace celebrates his 1st qualifier win at Daytona with his newborn
item.description: Wallace, driving the No. 23 Toyota for 23XI Racing, won the first of two qualifying races Thursday for the upcoming Daytona 500. He showed enough speed to make him one of the favorites heading into “The Great American Race.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: CMU Swimming continues dominance at RMAC Championships
item.description: The Mesa Mavericks are gearing up for Nationals next month, putting their talent on full display at the RMAC Championships
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Study finds Bears fans most heartbroken in the NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — In Chicago, sports and heartbreak go hand-in-hand. The Bears just went 5-12 when ahead of the season, they had playoff aspirations. The Bulls are fresh off back-to-back demolitions from the Detroit Pistons and embarking on a rebuild heading into the NBA all-star break.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: White Sox sign veteran CF Michael A. Taylor to 1-year deal
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Center fielder Michael A. Taylor and the Chicago White Sox have agreed to a $1.95 million, one-year contract. Chicago announced the agreement Wednesday. Taylor spent last season with the Pittsburgh Pirates, batting .193 with five home runs, 21 RBI and a .543 OPS in 113 games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Clippers fan hits insane half-court shot to win grand prize
item.description: Ahead of Valentine's Day on Friday, this Los Angeles Clippers fan is reminding you to "shoot your shot.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Countdown to the 2025 Daytona 500: Drivers get ready for season opener
item.description: The biggest race in NASCAR is only a few days away, where 40 drivers will compete to win “The Great American Race.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Chicago State begins search for head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The South Side's Chicago State University launched a search to find their first head football coach Tuesday. “We are excited to reach this milestone in our football planning.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: (AP) -- A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Clayton Kershaw to return to Los Angeles Dodgers: reports
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers legend Clayton Kershaw is returning to the defending World Series champions for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Cubs spring training: Shota Imanaga ready to help anchor starting rotation after spectacular rookie season
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — Old Man Winter has its icy grip on Chicagoland this week, but here's a warm reminder that summer is inching closer: Cubs pitchers and catchers reported to camp Monday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Lakers blow past Jazz in Doncic debut, 132-113
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz were no match for the Lakers in the much-anticipated debut of Luka Doncic. Doncic had 14 points, five rebounds and four assists in his Lakers debut as Los Angeles beat the Utah Jazz 132-113 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rudd, Edwards named newest NASCAR Hall of Fame inductees
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — One of the toughest drivers in NASCAR history joined one the most enigmatic drivers of the modern era as the newest inductees into the Hall of Fame in a star-studded Friday night ceremony.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Super Bowl LIX highlights: Memorable plays, moving tributes and a historic presidential visit
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 in the first Super Bowl to be held in New Orleans in a dozen years. It was played amid heavy security — and with President Donald Trump in attendance — just 41 days after a man plowed a truck into New Year's revelers on Bourbon Street.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Fox 5

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley sets the NFL's season rushing record, including the playoffs
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Saquon Barkley set an NFL single-season rushing record in the Super Bowl, held his young daughter as a torrent of confetti fluttered around them and flashed a smile as he held a Philadelphia newspaper with “CHAMPS!” stamped above his photo.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC earns first shootout victory over Capitals
item.description: WASHINGTON D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is carrying a ton of momentum into the Four Nations Break. Karel Vejmelka made 30 saves in relief, and the Utah Hockey Club recovered for a 5-4 shootout win against the Washington Capitals at Capital One Arena on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: What happens to the Super Bowl losers' merch? It's being sent to these 5 countries
item.description: The NFL plans for both outcomes so they're ready regardless of who wins. What that inevitably means is a whole lot of merchandise that's pre-printed and pre-made – but fans won't ever be able to buy it.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Latest: Eagles spoil Chiefs' three-peat bid, win Super Bowl 40-22
item.description: Super Bowl 59 kicks off in just a few hours, when the Kansas City Chiefs will face a familiar foe, the Philadelphia Eagles, hoping to win the Lombardi Trophy for a record third year in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Photos: President Trump arrives at Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans
item.description: In addition to the history that may be made on the field, the U.S. will see a first during Super Bowl LIX: a sitting president will be in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation
